name: engine
description: Codex and Claude Code plugin suite for session continuity, quality gates, shared skills, shared subagents, domain harness design, and Deep Research prompt generation

plugins.name: session-memory
plugins.description: Project-scoped session continuity for Codex and Claude Code with checkpoint, resume, status, and monorepo-safe artifact storage

plugins.name: quality-guard
plugins.description: Quality gate helpers that catch superficial work, vague responses, and missing AGENTS.md guidance

plugins.name: shared-subagents
plugins.description: Reusable Codex and Claude Code subagent templates for workflow routing, requirement review, test adequacy, closure, risk, code review, and security audit

plugins.name: shared-skills
plugins.description: Reusable Codex and Claude Code workflow skills for requirements traceability, research evidence, scenario-based tests, implementation evidence, and verification gates

plugins.name: harness-foundry
plugins.description: Skill workflows for diagnosing project domains and designing, scaffolding, and auditing domain harnesses

plugins.name: deep-research-prompt-export
plugins.description: ChatGPT Deep Research prompt export bridge that generates source-backed handoff prompts from live project context without calling external APIs
